author: Dustin G.
pros: Job Budget control screen and interactive reports on job costs in real time. Implementation team was phenomenal at helping to deal with the challenges of leaving an inferior software.
cons: The migration from quickbooks was very challenging and time consuming. But that is much more an indictment of quickbooks than it is of Jonas.

description: Premier meets our business needs and the continuous development and enchantments ensures keeping up with industry and technology changes
author: Marlene L.
pros: Seamless implementation with great support. A totally integrated system with great value for money. A market leader
cons: No bank feeds but this has now been added and is nearly ready for testing. A dedicated account manager would be great

review_title: Product on the good path to success!
description: Overall Jonas Premier is a good software, but it is definitely not the greatest accounting software. At least just yet.
author: Karolina L.
pros: The software is very easy to navigate and very easy to use.
cons: Many errors and not all the features (especially accounting or reporting) are not well developed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Huge Time Savings and Better Project Tracking with Premier
author: Shelby G.
pros: We save a huge amount of time with Premier. We used to log lump sums in Excel without knowing which invoice they came from, then dig through QuickBooks to match them. Now, we just click the line item in Premier, and all the invoices come up. You can drill down instantly and find out where discrepancies could be. That’s been huge for us. The project managers now have more insight into where their project budgets are at, what's being spent on the job and if it's being allocated properly. Without Premier, PMs wouldn't really know what's being charged to their projects or the status of their subcontracts. It was very easy to misallocate an invoice.
cons: Implementation was a bit slow. We had some major differences in our opening balance between Premier and QuickBooks that we had to get fixed, but it's all good now.

review_title: Best Accounting Software for Construction Company
author: Jenny N.
pros: Project Collaboration, Bank Feeds feature to be released, Job Forecasts, Credit Card and Reimbursement submission through Expense App
cons: AP invoice approval screens. Better to separate between supplier and subcontractors to allow limi modifications authority

description: Out of all softwares i have used in my career, Premeir is the most enhanced and provides real solutions that make my life easier
author: Jarrod W.
pros: The ease of use and convenience. The support from the team and their willingness to user feedback continuous Improvement
cons: It’s lack of API integration with other softwares does hold it back.but other than that nothing much

description: One of the easiet softwares to use. Also the synergy event allows us understand the gap of how much we already know the system and the useful functions we didnt know that’s available.
author: Sophia S.
pros: It’s very user friendly, and support team is great which is crucial in getting your work done day in day out.
cons: No phone calls can make to the support team. Sometimes it’s easier to explain things on the phone. However, the support team very proactive and informative.

review_title: A Modern Platform That Fits the Way We Work
author: Justin M.
pros: When evaluating new solutions, what stood out about Premier was its modernized and flexible feel. A lot of the other platforms we looked at felt outdated or too rigid. Our design-build model doesn’t follow a traditional GC approach, so we needed a system that could adapt to how we work, not the other way around.
cons: While no rollout is ever completely smooth, the training and onboarding support made a big difference. I took the lead internally, and the key was really getting buy-in from our team. Change is never easy, but once we committed to it, we saw real results.

review_title: Excellent Software for the Value It Offers
description: I've had a very positive experience using Jonas Premier. Jonas Premier offers excellent value for money compared to other construction management platforms, especially given the wide range of features included. Having project accounting and project management teams collaborating on the same platform helps align the field and the office, reducing miscommunication, improving cost and project tracking, and enhancing approval processes within one unified system.
author: Ilona Y.
pros: I also appreciate that Jonas Premier actively listens to client feedback and continuously adapts the software to meet real-world needs. The quarterly releases demonstrate a clear commitment to ongoing improvement, with updates that are practical and directly informed by user input. Overall, Jonas Premier feels like a solution that’s evolving alongside its customers, which adds a lot of long-term value.
cons: One limitation is that Jonas Premier does not currently have the ability to process payroll, which requires using an external system for that function

review_title: Real-Time Visibility That Puts Us in Control
author: Carlo F.
pros: The impact that the real-time data of Premier has allows us to catch red flags as soon as they happen without having to wait until a quarter end or a month end and that to us is very, very important. With the project dashboard, each project is almost like its own little company. You have your receivables, you have your payables, your hold back, your profitability. It's very easy to just select the project and get all that information with one touch so we use that all the time. The feature that I rely on the most on Premier for the past 3 years is the OData feature. With this feature, you're able to pull out live data from Premier into Excel with a push of a button and the most important part of this is being able to refresh that data whenever you want.
cons: Like with any software, there are always a few things to fine-tune to meet your specific needs. That said, the support team is responsive and helpful—they work through any issues to ensure your team’s success.

description: Excellent customer service and very organize in the implementation process. The web training and 1:1 meetings are great tool in learning the software. Once live the team elevate meeting is perfect, continued support for actual data entry and use of the modules accordingly.
author: Imelda P.
pros: All modules are very user friendly, easy to navigate, the quick search feature works great and customized forms are very handy. Saves a lot of time in uploading data by using the template, history upload and setup. The job dashboard is excellent tool in project management. Timely response from the implementation team is added bonus what makes Premier a very good software , construction or corporate/owner companies.
cons: Need improvement/enhancement email notification for invoices approval.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our overall experience has been very positive. The customer service is exceptional. The software itself is very complete - it has more capabilities than we even use, but having the options makes for a pleasant surprise when we do need to dive deeper or track additional costs.
author: Amy S.
pros: We are very pleased with the software. The ability to connect project management with accounting has made us much more efficient. Overall, we are excited about our decision. What makes Premier an even better decision for us, is the customer service and support staff. We have had the pleasure of working with Aisha over the past couple of months to iron out some of our implementation process and she has gone over and above any of our expectations.
cons: There have been some learning curves coming from QB. In my opinion, QB has set a standard for accounting softwares where the rest of the industry has followed suit. Cons are not necessarily from the software, but in breaking habits that had become "our" normal.

author: Megan D.
pros: Integration between project management and accounting. Also, the interface is very intuitive and appealing.
cons: We had a very bumpy launch which continues to have repercussions over a year later.

review_title: Streamlining Operations and Saving $50,000 a Year with Premier
author: Cassie G.
pros: What really sold us on Premier was having everything in one place. The dashboards were a huge help. We used to export reports, wait for downloads, and email them to PMs just so they’d know what was outstanding. Now, it’s all there in real time. I love the job dashboard—it tells PMs exactly what they need to know. I can pull AP reports in seconds; it used to take 30 minutes. Payroll that used to take two days now takes minutes. And we’re no longer relying on outdated information—we have real-time data that’s accurate and relevant. The Sub Pay App made a huge impact. Invoices aren’t sitting in inboxes anymore—PMs can process them directly. We’ve reduced our accounting team by one person and are running more profitably. Cost Plus billing is much easier now. It automatically pulls invoices, and if we’re not billing this month, we can easily move it to the next. We used to miss things—now we catch them. We’re all looking at the same information—and we can trust it. If Premier was taken away, the impact would be huge. We’re saving close to $50,000 a year.
cons: As with all new things, the initial learning curve and adjustment of processes.

author: Priscilla B.
pros: The platform is user friendly and the help desk is so good and quick, which is very rare these days.
cons: The software is missing a few features such as claiming pending client variations and cash flow forecasting

review_title: Premier: Intuitive, Powerful, and Essential for Our Business
author: Brian T.
pros: I really like the functionality of Premier—it's incredibly intuitive. The look-up features are so handy, and I found myself navigating the software much faster than other systems We previously used Sage, and it was so cumbersome. Even finding or generating reports was difficult. With Premier, it's much easier - the search functionality makes it simple to look up reports. We’ve been using Premier for almost five years, and we’re still discovering new features—it's amazing how much it can do! Job costing is particularly important to me. Since we set up each house as a separate job, I’m constantly in there reviewing job costs, as are our project managers. One of my favorite features is how easily I can drill down into details—if I need to check an invoice, I just click, and it takes me right to it. The journal audits are another great tool for tracking where something went, and they’ve been incredibly helpful. At the end of the day, Premier really is the backbone of our business. It does so much for us, and I think that’s critical in a software partner.
cons: No cons to advise on about Premier software.

review_title: Premier Construction Software is a Necessity
description: Overall, Premier Construction Software is a great product to use in your contract administration and project management. I would refer this software to all who seeks to find solution in organizing projects with the amenities of this product.
author: Julius R.
pros: Premier Construction Software is an awesome software that is helpful in project management and contract administration. I like the interface and how it categorizes each discipline in the construction environment. I like how you can use the different features to organize entities from trades, subcontractors, builders and professional entities for tracking and detailed information.
cons: The least that I like about the Premier Construction software is the insertion of fields and a number of tabs that is sometimes misleading especially if you are not well trained to work on the software.

description: “We are a General Contractor focused on commercial construction, and as a CFO with 30 years of experience, I want to commend your solution. The resources are excellent, and I appreciate how you continuously incorporate client feedback to enhance the user experience. Your team’s support has been outstanding—responsive, with great follow-up that provides tremendous value. The streamlined job dashboard is a standout, giving us a quick, efficient view of all ongoing activities. We're also excited about the new features, particularly the mobile functionality for our project managers. Thank you for your commitment to improving the software and providing excellent support.”
author: Andi U.
pros: Job dashboard and exceptional client support!
cons: No cons to list at this point in time!!!

description: Our trainer truly took the time to understand our business and individual requirements for each of our PMs & Accountants. We are a very detailed organization, and he was able to ask the right questions and get into the details that matter. Coming from AccuBuild – it was difficult to process CORs and link them to the subcontract. In Premier, everything is so automated!! It provides great visibility in your profitability and makes it easy for project managers & estimators to drill down into information real-time. Having this transparency is important to help us make more informed decisions. Best of all, it’s easy to use – even the PMs & Senior estimators love it and have adopted it. This is one solution that makes it easy to better manage your people and projects.
author: Lori C.
pros: Our trainer truly took the time to understand our business and individual requirements for each of our PMs & Accountants. We are a very detailed organization, and he was able to ask the right questions and get into the details that matter. Coming from AccuBuild – it was difficult to process CORs and link them to the subcontract. In Premier, everything is so automated!! It provides great visibility in your profitability and makes it easy for project managers & estimators to drill down into information real-time. Having this transparency is important to help us make more informed decisions. Best of all, it’s easy to use – even the PMs & Senior estimators love it and have adopted it. This is one solution that makes it easy to better manage your people and projects.
cons: At this moment there isn't any thing we feel is missing from the software.

author: Devorah T.
pros: This software is the first of its kind to give us real time financial information on our projects and company as a whole. The Job Dashboard and Job Forecast screens are everyone's favorite. It shows you everything you need to know on the financial health of your project/budget at any given time and you can drill down into pretty much anything for more detail. Commitments and compliances are easily trackable and things like double entries are avoidable because payments are done directly out of the software. Premier's customer support is extremely responsive, helpful and knowledgeable and always offers solutions on how to best customize the software for our company's unique goals and objectives.
cons: The software is not the easiest on the eyes and initially intimidates our project managers because it really looks and behaves like an accounting software. However, once the Project Managers learn the true capabilities of Premier, they are truly blown away. Would also be an added bonus if the software had more project management tools that are not related to the finances of the project.

description: My AR and AP experience has been turned in to a good, logical, and easy to understand one.
author: David M.
pros: I especially like that there seems to be a function for everything I could imagine or want. Most of it I haven't begun to use yet but slowly I am learning more of it. The Premier help team is critically important in helping me learn the skills I want and need when I want them. I also really like how Premier won't allow information to be entered without all the required information. Makes it very easy to not miss critical details.
cons: I found the learning curve steep, especially with respect to how the program "thinks". The trickiest part was understanding how information flows through the system.

description: Combining accounting and project management within one platform
author: Tyler M.
pros: Product is easy to use and reporting is getting robust
cons: We implemented this so long ago and fell behind on the new releases and haven’t really been notified continually of the new releases.

description: Premier is innovative and customer focused.
author: Ryan B.
pros: The automated flow of data between project management and accounting is amazing.
cons: Payroll could be improved. Need to be able record total hours for salaried employees and spread evenly across distribution.

description: Overall, we are very happy with the service and support we receive from Jonas. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been amazing in helping us out in our times of need and we are forever grateful for him and the entire support team.
author: Earl J.
pros: The software is web based which makes set up/maintenance a breeze. It's intuitive and flexible which makes day to day tasks much easier. We reviewed multiple options, but Jonas was the one best suited to our needs.
cons: Reports. The boxed reports are great, but don't always provide what we need so we build a lot of custom reports with the Excel-Add-In. The issue with that is that not all the fields in the database are available in the data downloads which often results in having to link several sheets in order to get the information we require.

author: Chad F.
pros: The ease of use, it is a very simple software to understand and utilize.
cons: The training of new employees to fully understand the software is not the easiest but the premier team is always available to aid in that aspect.
